title: Platform Usability (SUS)
description: Rate your EAL experience using validated SUS instrument.

exercises.claim: Complete the 10-item SUS questionnaire about EAL.
exercises.claimAr: أكمل استبيان SUS المكون من 10 عناصر.
exercises.explanation: SUS: 10 items, 5-point Likert. Score = sum × 2.5. Benchmarks: A(90+), B(80+), C(70+). Kirkpatrick L1.
